label: Country Cape Rotation
signal: Hold the 5 cheapest countries by value proxy, monthly rebalance.
description: Faber-style country value rotation: hold the 5 cheapest of 14 countries, monthly rebalance, CRSP world country returns. Cheapness proxy = inverse 12m return (Shiller CAPE download was blocked — todo proxy log).
reference: Shiller CAPE; Faber (2014), 'Global Value' — country valuation rotation
